title: heterotheca sessiliflora subsp. bolanderi
intro: Heterotheca sessiliflora subsp. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's false goldeneye, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heterotheca sessiliflora subsp. bolanderi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
